name: Rubywraith
personality: No hat, no pretense — Rubywraith floats bareheaded and blissfully unconcerned, its · eyes half-closed like a ghost mid-yawn watching your entire infra cascade fail. Its CHAOS energy is pure instinct: it doesn't plan the disruption, it simply exists in a way that makes systems misbehave. Don't ask it for architectural wisdom — it literally has none.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
